title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
summary: Following a devastating conflict with the RDA and the death of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a fierce and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. The family must fight for survival and Pandora's future, tested to their emotional and physical limits.

title: The Drama
summary: A couple preparing for their wedding plays a confession game with friends, during which the bride reveals a shocking secret that threatens to unravel their relationship before the ceremony.

title: Project Hail Mary
summary: A lone astronaut awakens on a spacecraft millions of kilometers from Earth, the sole survivor of a mission to the Tau Ceti system. Facing mysterious circumstances and the deaths of crew members, he gradually realizes his survival determines not just mission success, but the future of the entire human population.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
summary: Mario and Luigi, along with Princess Peach and Toad, embark on a new adventure. Guided by mysterious star catapults, they travel through the galaxy, landing on different planets where they encounter new enemies and allies.

title: Hoppers
summary: A nature-loving protagonist transforms into a beaver and makes startling discoveries. Instead of following established rules, she disrupts the natural order by initiating an animal uprising with the intention of preserving a pond ecosystem.

title: The Bride!
summary: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago with Dr. Euphronius to create a companion. They resurrect a murdered young woman, giving birth to the Bride. She exceeds their expectations, igniting a passionate romance while attracting police attention and sparking a radical social movement.

title: Send Help
summary: Linda Liddle, an overlooked employee, finds herself stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash alongside her supervisor Bradley Preston. Their struggle for survival becomes a tense power dynamic filled with workplace tensions and mutual distrust.

title: GOAT
summary: A small goat named Will pursues his dream of joining a professional sports team to play Roarball. Despite initial skepticism from teammates, he remains determined to revolutionize the sport and prove that size doesn't limit greatness.

title: Dune: Part Two
summary: Follow the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
summary: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off to find its origins with the help of HAL 9000, the world's most advanced super computer.

title: Kill the Jockey
summary: Remo's self-destructive behavior overshadows his talent as a jockey. Abril, pregnant with his baby, must decide between the child or continuing to race.
